title: Aureline AI audit-storage manifest contract
description: Boundary schema for the ai_audit_storage_manifest_record, the ai_audit_storage_artifact_record, and the ai_audit_storage_audit_event_record frozen in docs/ai/evidence_replayability_contract.md. The manifest is the typed register that describes which retained artifacts back a retained AI turn, what storage-object kind each artifact is (conversation history, derived cache, first-class evidence packet, receipt packet, audit-event stream, replay packet), what sensitivity / retention / export / delete / redaction posture each carries, and which artifacts/governance/record_class_registry.yaml row governs it. Raw prompt text, raw document bodies, raw terminal / log bodies, raw generated artifact bytes, raw request / response payloads, raw user-supplied text, raw paths, raw URLs, and raw credential material never cross the RPC boundary; this schema carries ids and typed vocabulary only. Adding a new storage_object_kind, retention_posture_class, export_posture_class, delete_posture_class, redaction_posture, audit-event id, or denial reason is additive-minor and requires an ai_audit_storage_manifest_schema_version bump; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

ai_audit_storage_manifest_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for this AI audit-storage manifest vocabulary export. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles / claim manifests / evidence packets / replay packets. Raw prompt text, raw document bodies, raw terminal / log bodies, raw generated artifact bytes, raw request / response payloads, raw user-supplied text, raw paths, raw URLs, and raw credential material never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

storage_object_kind.description: Frozen storage-object-kind vocabulary. conversation_history = raw-reference-only store of user turns / AI responses / tool-call envelopes. derived_cache = a cache authoritative for nothing. first_class_evidence_packet = a retained ai_evidence_packet_record with the full tainted_fence / source_reference / citation_anchor set addressable separately. receipt_packet = a retained ai_route_receipt_record or ai_spend_receipt_record. audit_event_stream = the local / managed audit-event backing for the ai_context / ai_evidence / ai_replay / ai_audit_storage streams. replay_packet = the retained ai_replay_packet_record. Silent re-classification between the six kinds is non-conforming.

retention_posture_class.description: Frozen retention-posture vocabulary for retained AI artifacts. Values compose over (and do not override) the record-class row the artifact cites; a manifest that widens retention beyond the cited row is non-conforming.

export_posture_class.description: Frozen export-posture vocabulary. packet_is_export names an artifact whose mint is already the export surface (e.g. a first-class evidence packet or a replay packet); exportable_on_request names an artifact that requires an explicit export action before it crosses a sink boundary.

delete_posture_class.description: Frozen delete-posture vocabulary. request_blocks_on_hold fires when an active legal / support / retention hold blocks terminal delete completion; the record-class registry row governs which hold classes apply.

redaction_posture.description: Frozen redaction-posture vocabulary. The broker-owned redaction pass (ADR-0007) runs on every write and on every export rewrite; no_redaction_required_metadata_only is legal only for rows whose sensitivity_class = metadata_safe_default and that carry no redactable content.

sensitivity_class.description: Frozen sensitivity-class vocabulary re-exported from schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json (ADR-0011) without modification.

audit_storage_audit_event_id.description: Frozen audit-event ids on the ai_audit_storage audit stream. Events MUST NOT carry raw bodies, raw paths, raw URLs, raw prompt text, or raw credential material.

audit_storage_denial_reason.description: Frozen denial-reason vocabulary. Denials fail closed; silent downgrade to a best-effort manifest is forbidden.

trust_state.description: ADR-0001 workspace-trust state at the moment the record was minted.

execution_context_id.description: ADR-0009 execution-context id when the record was minted inside a live execution. Null when the record was minted outside an execution context.

policy_context.description: Policy context the record was minted under.

retained_object_ref.description: Opaque reference to the retained object (ai_context_assembly_record id, ai_evidence_packet_record id, ai_route_receipt_record id, ai_spend_receipt_record id, ai_replay_packet_record id, audit-event stream id, derived-cache entry id, conversation-history slot id). Raw bodies never appear.

record_class_ref.description: Opaque pointer into artifacts/governance/record_class_registry.yaml (e.g. 'ai_retained_evidence_packet'). A retained artifact without a record_class_ref is non-conforming because its retention / hold / delete / export / offboarding posture would be invented per-surface.

exact_build_identity_ref.description: Opaque pin to the running-build identity (D-0011) the artifact was minted under.

provider_identity_ref.description: Opaque reference to the provider identity the artifact was produced by. Required (non-null) when storage_object_kind ∈ {conversation_history, first_class_evidence_packet, receipt_packet}; null otherwise.

model_identity_ref.description: Opaque reference to the model identity the artifact was produced by. Required (non-null) when storage_object_kind ∈ {conversation_history, first_class_evidence_packet, receipt_packet}; null otherwise.

retention_window_ends_at.description: Monotonic timestamp at which the retention window closes. Null when the retention window is open-ended (e.g. retained_under_legal_hold) or when the posture is not yet resolved.

hold_classes_active.description: Hold classes currently applied to the artifact. Empty when no hold is active. Re-exported from schemas/governance/record_class.schema.json without modification.

companion_manifest_ref.description: Required (non-null) when export_posture_class = packet_is_export AND the referenced record-class row sets manifest_required = true; null otherwise.

allOf.description: provider_identity_ref and model_identity_ref MUST be non-null when storage_object_kind is conversation_history.
First-class evidence packet artifacts MUST carry broker_redaction_pass_applied_at_capture or broker_redaction_pass_applied_at_export. A metadata-only redaction posture is non-conforming.
conversation_history, first_class_evidence_packet, and receipt_packet rows MUST carry provider_identity_ref and model_identity_ref.

ai_audit_storage_artifact_record.description: One retained artifact backing the AI turn. Every retained evidence / receipt / replay / audit-stream / cache / conversation-history object the manifest covers appears as one row. Retention / hold / delete / export / offboarding posture is inherited from the cited record-class registry row; a row that widens any posture beyond the record-class row denies with retention_widens_beyond_record_class (or the matching export / delete denial).

artifact_refs.description: Opaque references to the ai_audit_storage_artifact_record rows covered by this manifest. Every retained object backing the replay packet appears as one row; a retained turn with no artifact rows is non-conforming.

running_build_identity_ref.description: Opaque pin to the running build's exact-build identity (D-0011) at the moment the manifest was minted.

ai_audit_storage_manifest_record.description: Typed register of every retained artifact backing one AI turn. The replay packet (ai_replay_packet_record) quotes this manifest by id; downstream support / parity / claim surfaces read the manifest instead of re-deriving the retained-artifact set.

allOf.description: denial_reason MUST be non-null for ai_audit_storage_denial_emitted events.

ai_audit_storage_audit_event_record.description: Audit event emitted on the ai_audit_storage audit stream. Events MUST NOT carry raw bodies, raw paths, raw URLs, raw prompt text, or raw credential material.
